name: Brooke-Gould Memorial Sports Complex
description: Brooke-Gould Memorial Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Eaton, OH. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Preble County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Preble County YMCA in Eaton, OH! There are 6 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Smith Street Park
description: Smith Street Park is a place to play pickleball in West Alexandria, OH. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: The Gym & Star Theatre at Eagles Point
description: We will host open gym sessions during regular business hours. Individual court rentals will be available in 1.5 hour sessions. Court rentals will be $15 per session. Multiple sessions can be rented back to back. Please call 937-533-8181 to check availability and to schedule your court rental.
fees: Fee required — $6 per person, per session (55+ $3 per person, per session)
